expected.notes: Student is planning travel with a pending change of status; rule must fire with both conditions satisfied. is_nra=yes from f1_student stage with years<6.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'travel_during_pending_cos'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.planning_travel eq yes
  - answers.pending_status_change eq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
